hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer | Networking Enthusiast | Problem Solver
hero.profileSummary: India based software engineer focused on scalable architecture, portal engineering, enterprise workflow automation, and resilient backend systems.

about.title: Professional Summary
about.description: ServiceNow Developer at Accenture since July 2023, delivering high-impact enterprise solutions through full stack engineering discipline and workflow automation.

skills.title: Technical Arsenal
skills.description: Categorized strengths across frontend, backend, ServiceNow platform engineering, programming languages, and core computer science.

projects.title: Featured Engineering Work
projects.description: Production-style and systems-focused projects with strong architecture, user experience, and reliability considerations.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Meaningful
contact.description: Open to software engineering opportunities, collaboration, and platform modernization projects.

aboutCards.title: Current Role
aboutCards.text: Working as a ServiceNow Developer at Accenture since July 2023, delivering scalable workflows, automation improvements, and user-centric enterprise portal experiences.

aboutCards.title: Execution Depth
aboutCards.text: Delivered 100+ user stories and bug fixes while building custom Service Portal widgets from scratch using JavaScript, AngularJS, and robust platform scripting.

aboutCards.title: ServiceNow Core
aboutCards.text: Strong in workflows, UI Actions, Client Scripts, and Business Rules, with proven capability in building maintainable and performance-aware enterprise solutions.

aboutCards.title: Computer Science Foundation
aboutCards.text: Strong fundamentals in Networking, Operating Systems, DBMS, System Design, and algorithmic problem solving with 810+ solved LeetCode problems.

experienceBullets: Custom widget development for Service Portal with enhanced usability and maintainability.
Complex workflow automation using Business Rules, Client Scripts, UI Actions, and Flow Designer.
Delivered enterprise-grade improvements in performance and overall user experience.
Collaborated across teams to ship 100+ user stories and bug fixes on production timelines.
achievementBullets: 100+ Enterprise User Stories & Bug Fixes Delivered
